name: Carrot Parsnip Puree
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Carrots, Peeled and Cut into 3/4-Inch Pieces
1 lb Parsnips, Peeled and Cut into 3/4-Inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a splash of bourbon along with the Tabasco sauce balances the sweetness of the parsnips, giving this dish a wonderfully mellow flavor.
2. Place the carrots and parsnips in a 2-quart saucepan and cover with cold water. Add salt and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender but not mushy. Drain well.
4. Transfer the cooked vegetables to a food processor and puree with the remaining ingredients until smooth.
